prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次依次约 7218→11535→17975→10929→10750，整体呈震荡波动格局。2021–2023 年位次大幅后移（从 7218 跌至 17975），2024 年新高考首年大幅回升至 10929，2025 年基本持平于 10750，近两年趋于稳定，2025 年基准约 10750 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2022 年均为 18 人，2023–2025 年增至 20 人；2026 年计划 19 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招 1 人（-5%），缩招通常意味着竞争略有缓解，位次数字可能小幅前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京师范大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 58 名，近年排名稳定在 52–61 名区间，属于中上游 211 院校，在师范类院校中仅次于北京师范大学和华东师范大学；2025–2026 年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗等），负面舆情可能对 2026 年报考热度产生一定抑制，位次数字有后移压力。抖音热度总排名第 69 名（评价「一般」），近年曝光度有所下降。历史投档异常记录中该校未出现断档信号，报考热度相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，地理学 A、教育学 A、马克思主义理论 A、中国语言文学 A-、外国语言文学 A-，共 5 个 A- 及以上学科，师范类和文理基础学科实力突出，对相关专业考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年吉林省普通高考总人数约 110868 人，较 2025 年（111492 人）略降约 0.56%；按近年比例估算物理类约 80047 人，较 2025 年（80421 人）减少约 374 人，考生总数小幅下降，竞争压力略有缓解。；南京师范大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角发达地区，对吉林省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在吉林省招生规模较小（理科约 19–20 人），招生人数波动对位次影响较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年趋于稳定（10750 附近）、2026 年计划小幅缩招 1 人（位次前移）、声誉负面舆情（位次后移）、考生总数略降（位次前移）等多重因素，净效果为位次小幅前移。预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 10378 名，区间 9878–10878 名。

- 生物科学类（生物科学（师范、国家理科基地班）、生物技术、生态学）
- 计算机科学与技术。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 9878–10878 名以内，建议以二档专业（地理科学类、能源动力类）为主攻方向，一档专业（化学、生物科学类、计算机）作为冲刺，三档专业（合成生物学、应急管理）作为保底。位次明显 优于区间下限（<9878 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 7218→11535→17975→10929→10750, showing an overall fluctuating pattern. Rankings dropped significantly from 2021 to 2023 (from 7218 to 17975), rebounded sharply to 10929 in 2024 (the first year of the new Gaokao), and remained roughly stable at 10750 in 2025, stabilizing in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 10750. Provincial science/physics enrollment plans were 18 students in 2021–2022, increased to 20 in 2023–2025, and are planned at 19 in 2026, a slight reduction of 1 student (-5%) compared to 2025. A reduction usually implies slightly eased competition, potentially moving the ranking number slightly forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 58th, with recent rankings stable in the 52–61 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions, second only to Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University among normal universities. Its 2025–2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly due to teacher ethics incidents (a vice dean dismissed for extramarital affairs, mistakenly displaying a Rising Sun flag, etc.). Negative public opinion may suppress application enthusiasm for 2026, putting downward pressure on rankings. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 69th (rated 'average'), with declining exposure in recent years. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of gaps for this university, indicating relatively stable application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it achieved A in Geography, A in Education, A in Marxist Theory, A- in Chinese Language and Literature, and A- in Foreign Languages and Literatures, totaling 5 A- or above disciplines. Its strengths in normal and basic arts and sciences disciplines continue to attract relevant major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jilin Province general Gaokao is approximately 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.56% from 2025 (111,492). Estimated physics category candidates are about 80,047, a decrease of about 374 from 2025 (80,421), with a slight decline in total candidates, slightly easing competition pressure. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal for Jilin candidates. Its enrollment scale in Jilin is small (about 19–20 science students), making ranking fluctuations more sensitive to enrollment number changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors—stable rankings in recent two years (around 10750), a slight enrollment reduction of 1 student in 2026 (ranking forward), negative reputation incidents (ranking backward), and a slight decrease in total candidates (ranking forward)—the net effect is a slight forward movement in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 physics category is approximately 10378, with a range of 9878–10878.

- Computer Science and Technology.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9878–10878, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Geographical Sciences, Energy and Power) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Chemistry, Biological Sciences, Computer Science) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Synthetic Biology, Emergency Management) as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<9878), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1253→1161→2448→1336→1849, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, the ranking dropped sharply to 2448 (possibly due to a large decrease in the provincial control score for liberal arts that year). In 2024, the first year of the new college entrance exam, it rebounded to 1336, and in 2025 it fell again to 1849, presenting an overall oscillating pattern, with a baseline of about 1849 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history enrollment plan was 8 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 6 in 2023–2025; the 2026 plan is 7 students, a slight increase of 1 student (+16.7%) compared to 2025. An enrollment expansion usually means slightly intensified competition, potentially pushing the ranking number backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 58th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 institutions and leading among normal universities. The reputation evaluation for 2025–2026 is 'clearly negative', mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (a vice dean dismissed for extramarital affairs, mistakenly displaying the Rising Sun Flag, etc.). Negative public opinion may suppress the application enthusiasm for 2026 to some extent, putting downward pressure on the ranking number. Its Douyin popularity ranks 69th overall (rated 'average'), with decreased exposure in recent years. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of gaps for this university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education received A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, highlighting outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines, which continue to attract liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jilin Province general college entrance exam is approximately 110,868, slightly lower than in 2025. Based on recent proportions, the history category is estimated to have about 30,821 candidates, a decrease of about 250 from 2025 (31,071), indicating a slight reduction in total candidates and a slight easing of competition pressure. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a developed region in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal to Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment scale for liberal arts in Jilin is relatively small (about 6–7 students), making the ranking sensitive to fluctuations in enrollment numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the upward oscillating trend of historical rankings, a slight enrollment expansion of 1 student in 2026 (ranking backward), negative reputation public opinion (ranking backward), and a slight decrease in total candidates (ranking forward), the net effect is a slight backward shift in ranking. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will be approximately 2064, with a range of 1692–2436.
